expressions.string:
"""Kitchen-sink Python blueprint for tractor snapshot tests.

This fixture is rendered by `tractor query <file> -p tree --single` with
NO depth limit, so any design-principle transform change produces a visible
snapshot diff. It is intentionally syntactically valid but not runnable.
"""

comments.text:
# `from __future__ import …`; module-level so it parses as
# future_import_statement (a separate kind from import_from_statement).

# Python 3.12 type-alias statement and PEP 695 generics with constraints,
# member-types, and splat-types.

expressions.string:

comments.text:
